game_info.title: Track Runner 3D
game_info.concept: An endless running game where players control a character running on three parallel train tracks, swiping left or right to change lanes, up to jump over obstacles, and down to slide under barriers. The game continuously scrolls forward at increasing speeds, spawning trains, barriers, and collectible coins at predetermined intervals that become more frequent and challenging over time.
game_info.description: Navigate a character running on three parallel train tracks in this fast-paced endless runner. Dodge oncoming trains, jump over barriers, slide under obstacles, and collect coins to increase your score. The game speeds up progressively, testing your reflexes as the challenge intensifies. Survive as long as you can while collecting the maximum number of coins!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left / A: Switch to left lane
Arrow Right / D: Switch to right lane
Arrow Up / W: Jump over obstacles
Arrow Down / S: Slide under barriers
Space: Jump (alternative)
Enter: Start game
Escape: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic lane switching mechanics and collision detection with trains. This verifies that the player can move between lanes smoothly and that collision detection works correctly when hitting trains.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Automatically switch lanes every few frames to test lane transitions. Intentionally collide with trains in different lanes to verify collision detection. Collect some coins along the way to test scoring.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should smoothly transition between all three lanes. When colliding with a train, the game should end with GAME_OVER_LOSE phase. Coins should be collected and added to the score successfully.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing extended survival by avoiding all obstacles and collecting maximum coins. This simulates a skilled player trying to achieve a high score by perfect dodging and coin collection.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use predictive AI to detect upcoming obstacles and switch lanes, jump, or slide appropriately. Prioritize coin collection when safe. Continue playing until reaching a score threshold of 500 points.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should survive for an extended period, successfully avoiding all obstacles through lane changes, jumps, and slides. Score should reach 500 points through coin collection, triggering GAME_OVER_WIN.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing jump mechanics over low barriers and obstacle timing. Verifies that jumping clears obstacles correctly and that the jump animation/physics work as intended.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Stay in the center lane and jump over every barrier that appears. Test jump timing by jumping early, on-time, and late to verify collision detection during jump arc.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Properly timed jumps should clear barriers without collision. Early or late jumps that result in collision should end the game. Jump animation should be smooth with proper arc physics.
TEST_3.description: Testing jump mechanics over low barriers and obstacle timing. Verifies that jumping clears obstacles correctly and that the jump animation/physics work as intended.
TEST_3.strategy: Stay in the center lane and jump over every barrier that appears. Test jump timing by jumping early, on-time, and late to verify collision detection during jump arc.
TEST_3.expected: Properly timed jumps should clear barriers without collision. Early or late jumps that result in collision should end the game. Jump animation should be smooth with proper arc physics.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing slide mechanics under high barriers. Verifies that sliding reduces player hitbox correctly and allows passing under barriers that would otherwise cause collision.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Stay in one lane and slide under every high barrier that appears. Test slide timing and duration to ensure the player stays low long enough to clear obstacles.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Sliding should reduce player height and allow safe passage under high barriers. The slide should have appropriate duration and the player should return to normal height after. Improper timing should result in collision.
TEST_4.description: Testing slide mechanics under high barriers. Verifies that sliding reduces player hitbox correctly and allows passing under barriers that would otherwise cause collision.
TEST_4.strategy: Stay in one lane and slide under every high barrier that appears. Test slide timing and duration to ensure the player stays low long enough to clear obstacles.
TEST_4.expected: Sliding should reduce player height and allow safe passage under high barriers. The slide should have appropriate duration and the player should return to normal height after. Improper timing should result in collision.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing progressive difficulty scaling. Verifies that game speed increases over time and obstacle frequency/patterns become more challenging as the game progresses.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Survive for an extended period while monitoring game speed and obstacle patterns. Measure the time between obstacles and game scroll speed at different score thresholds.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Game speed should noticeably increase as score grows. Obstacles should appear more frequently and in more challenging patterns. The difficulty curve should feel natural and challenging but fair.
TEST_5.description: Testing progressive difficulty scaling. Verifies that game speed increases over time and obstacle frequency/patterns become more challenging as the game progresses.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing pause/resume functionality and state management. Verifies that the game properly pauses all movement and can resume without issues.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: When paused, all game entities should freeze in place. The pause screen should display clearly. Resuming should continue gameplay smoothly without any position glitches or state corruption.
TEST_6.description: Testing pause/resume functionality and state management. Verifies that the game properly pauses all movement and can resume without issues.
TEST_6.expected: When paused, all game entities should freeze in place. The pause screen should display clearly. Resuming should continue gameplay smoothly without any position glitches or state corruption.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing restart functionality and proper game state reset. Verifies that restarting the game properly clears all entities and resets all variables to initial values.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Play until game over, then press R to restart. Verify that player position, score, speed, and all obstacles are reset. Start a new game and verify it plays identically to the first run.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Restarting should clear all obstacles, reset player to starting position and lane, reset score to 0, and reset game speed to initial value. The new game should be identical to a fresh start.
TEST_7.description: Testing restart functionality and proper game state reset. Verifies that restarting the game properly clears all entities and resets all variables to initial values.
TEST_7.strategy: Play until game over, then press R to restart. Verify that player position, score, speed, and all obstacles are reset. Start a new game and verify it plays identically to the first run.
TEST_7.expected: Restarting should clear all obstacles, reset player to starting position and lane, reset score to 0, and reset game speed to initial value. The new game should be identical to a fresh start.
